rules.description: Create tests only for behavior that exists in the Swag Labs UI. Do not invent /api endpoints for saucedemo.com.
Put reusable interactions in pages/saucedemo page objects and keep specs focused on Arrange, Act, Assert.
Prefer data-test selectors, then roles, then visible text. Avoid XPath, nth-child, and brittle CSS paths.
Use Playwright auto-waiting and expect assertions. Never use waitForTimeout, sleep, or setTimeout in tests.
CI must retain traces, screenshots, and HTML/JUnit reports for failed tests.
Security tests for this target should focus on UI input handling, protected route redirects, and session clearing because the app has no public REST API.
